THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, JODI A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1139 MARKET ST, #137, SFCA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, NO MONEY JUDGMNT. WRIT MAY ISSUE F/W. DEFT. WAIVES CLAIMS. DEFT. SOLE OCCUPANT. DEFT. ABANDONES PERS. PROP. IF DEFT. VAC. TIMELY, PLTF. WILL DISMISS W/PREJ. NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION.

JUDGE L. SING, RPT. MARYANN BURNS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. SIDNEY BERENSTEIN DEFT. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETLMNT. CONF. STIP JUDGMENT: PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGMNT: RESTIT. OF PREMISES. LEASE FORFEITED. PLTF. WAIVE RENT AND DAMAGES. WRIT ISSUE F/W STAY 6/3/94. DEFT. WAIVE ANY CLAIMS. DEFT. SOLE OCCUPANT. DEFT. ABANDONS ANY PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND. IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY, PLTF. TO FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJUDICE. DEFT. WAIVES RIGHT FOR STAY OF EXECUTION.
